name: quicklinker
title: QuickLinker
description: Resolve your QuickLinker shortcuts directly from Raycast
author: n-winspear

commands.name: quick-open
commands.title: Quick Open Shortcut
commands.subtitle: QuickLinker
commands.description: Open a QuickLinker shortcut by name. Tip: set "gl" as an alias for this command for even faster access.

commands.name: search-shortcuts
commands.title: Search Shortcuts
commands.subtitle: QuickLinker
commands.description: Search and open your QuickLinker shortcuts. Requires an optional API token — enable API access in your QuickLinker dashboard to use this command.

preferences.name: magicKey
preferences.title: Magic Key
preferences.description: Paste your magic key from quicklinker.app — go to Dashboard > Settings > Advanced to copy it

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token (Optional)
preferences.description: Optional — only needed for Search Shortcuts. Go to Dashboard > Settings > Advanced > Enable API Access to generate one
